no: Framed goes after BG1NPC and REBG1. Does it conflict with Candlekeep Revisited? #L-FRAMED-VOICE;Framed - Use custom voice-overs for new chapter movies #L-FRAMED-NO_VOICE;Framed - Leave out the custom chapter voice-overs Candlekeep Revisited (normal placement) A rework of the BG1 tutorial prologue arc, fleshing out characters, giving more tasks to do and acknowledging your chosen class. Not released yet, but it could be a decent mod for new players. Artisan: "One thing I should note is that you c This means you can loot Candlekeep before leaving as any class on your main character!Install Candlekeep Revisited before Jarl’s Adventure Pack.

conflicts.reason: Randomiser Mode 1 (in-game scripts) clashes with Skip Candlekeep — needs time in starting area

Both COPY_EXISTING arkani3.cre, deder3.cre, deder.cre. MiH EQ patches stats/items/proficiencies, CR patches scripts/portraits/quest variables. Install order resolves: CR installs first (quest mods), MiH EQ installs later (creature mods) — MiH EQ stat upgrades win, CR quests preserved. Both work together.

Design choice, not technical conflict. SCS cn:4145 (Remove tutorial NPCs) is compatible — just removes hand-holding NPCs. SCS cn:4146 (Skip Candlekeep entirely) bypasses the prologue, making Candlekeep Revisited content inaccessible. Do not use cn:4146 if you want Candlekeep Revisited content. No file-level conflict — purely a content accessibility choice.
conflicts.theirComps: #4145 Remove tutorial NPCs (compatible) #4146 Skip Candlekeep entirely (defeats purpose)
conflicts.source: cn:4145 removes NPCs only; cn:4146 skips area entirely via script; no file overlap, content accessibility issue, 2026-04

sum: Lets you return to Candlekeep as a visitor during BG1, with new dialogues and interactions reflecting your journey since leaving.

co.no: Expands BG1 prologue with new quests and areas in Candlekeep.
